title: The Agile Tool Set Ecosystem
description: A visual map categorizing the essential tools used to support different activities within the Agile development process, showing how they interconnect to facilitate the flow of work.
elements: CI/CD & Automation Tools (e.g., Jenkins, GitHub Actions)
relationships: Planning tools define the work (User Stories) that flows into Development tools. Collaboration tools connect all team members. Code from Development is integrated and tested automatically by CI/CD tools, with feedback loops going back to Planning and Collaboration platforms.
